prompt: You need to change how nested blueprints combine URL prefixes and registration options. Identify the files, symbols, and tests most likely to be affected.

expected_symbols.name: Blueprint.register
expected_symbols.why: Applies blueprint registration state and nested registrations.

expected_symbols.name: BlueprintSetupState.add_url_rule
expected_symbols.why: Combines prefixes and endpoint options while adding rules.

expected_claims.text: Application-level registration starts in the sansio app registration method.
Nested blueprint behavior is owned by the sansio blueprint registration code.
URL prefix and endpoint composition should be tested through blueprint registration tests.
The public flask.blueprints module is a wrapper surface, while the core registration behavior is in the sansio blueprint module.

forbidden_claims.text: Nested blueprint URL prefixes are controlled by the request dispatch method.
Blueprint registration can be changed without checking blueprint tests.
